wine_experiences.name: Comboio Histórico do Douro (Historic Train)
wine_experiences.address: Estação de Peso da Régua, 5050-237 Peso da Régua, Portugal
wine_experiences.description: A heritage train of vintage carriages running the scenic Régua to Tua line along the river, with onboard music, a glass of Port and regional sweets, in season.
wine_experiences.group_size: Open seating; book ahead in season

wine_experiences.name: Quinta do Tedo Harvest Foot-Treading
wine_experiences.description: A hands-on vindima day at the organic Tedo estate: harvest grapes in the vineyard, lunch with the pickers, then tread the grapes barefoot in granite lagares.
wine_experiences.duration: Full day during the September harvest
wine_experiences.price_range: Priced on request; book ahead in harvest season

wine_experiences.name: Croft Quinta da Roêda Grape Treading
wine_experiences.description: Croft's Pinhão estate runs a harvest grape-treading experience in the lagares, paired with an estate visit and a Roêda tasting, with hat and shirt provided.
wine_experiences.duration: Around half a day during harvest
wine_experiences.price_range: Priced on request; harvest season only

wine_experiences.name: Quinta da Pacheca Harvest Experience
wine_experiences.address: Rua do Relógio do Sol 261, Cambres, 5100-424 Lamego, Portugal
wine_experiences.description: One of the Douro's oldest estates near Régua offers harvest-day grape picking and treading in eight granite lagares from 1916, with tastings and optional dinner.
wine_experiences.duration: Half day to full day during harvest
wine_experiences.price_range: From around EUR 90 per person in harvest season

verified.address_quoted: Rua do Relógio do Sol 261, Cambres, 5100-424 Lamego

wine_experiences.name: Douro Valley Helicopter Tour
wine_experiences.address: Rua Mouzinho da Silveira 352, 4050-418 Porto, Portugal
wine_experiences.description: A helicopter flight over the terraced Douro vineyards from Porto, with options to land at a quinta for a tasting, framing the UNESCO landscape from the air.
wine_experiences.duration: Half day including flight and tasting

wine_experiences.name: Rabelo Boat Cruise from Pinhão
wine_experiences.description: A cruise on a traditional rabelo boat, the wooden vessel once used to carry Port barrels downriver, taking in terraced vineyards on the Pinhão to Tua stretch.

wine_experiences.name: Quinta do Bomfim Premium Vintage Experience
wine_experiences.description: A guided estate visit at Dow's Bomfim ending with a premium flight of Vintage Ports and Dow's Old Tawnies, tasted overlooking the river at Pinhão.
wine_experiences.price_range: Premium flights from around EUR 25 per person

wine_experiences.name: Taylor's Port Tasting and Blending Flight
wine_experiences.address: Rua do Choupelo 250, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_experiences.description: An in-depth Port tasting at Taylor's Gaia lodge stepping through Chip Dry, LBV and aged Tawnies to show how styles are built, after the cellar audio tour.

verified.address_quoted: Rua do Choupelo, nº 250, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia
